response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with strong full-stack, DLang, and system architecture capabilities, he lacks the mandatory 5 to 10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform. Furthermore, his background does not demonstrate the required deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking, making him an inadequate fit for this highly specialized role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across various architectures, including microservices and event-driven platforms.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and test-driven development (TDD).
Exposure to the financial technology sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only a brief 6-month stint utilizing C/C++ professionally in 2014-2015.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income systems.
Lacks specified enterprise database experience with SQL Server or Oracle, focusing instead on MongoDB and general SQL/MySQL.
